name: Heino

skills.name: Fate's Guidance
skills.description: Basic Attack damage differs depending on whether he is in melee or ranged mode. Skills and melee Basic Attacks place marks on enemies.

skills.name: Scepter of Fate
skills.description:
Attacks in the target direction. If the target has a mark, skill cooldown is reduced.
Ranged: Deals damage and an extra attack to marked targets.
Melee: Deals damage and inflicts slow. Recovers Health upon hitting marked targets.

skills.name: Leap of Fate
skills.description:
Dashes forward and switches attack mode.
Enters melee mode if enemy heroes are nearby, increasing Physical and Magical Defense and restoring Health; otherwise, enters ranged mode, leaving a memory and gaining Movement Speed.

skills.name: Fate Rewind
skills.description:
Gains damage reduction and crowd control immunity, recovers Health based on his current Health, and cannot move. Deals magical damage and travels back to where he was.
If there is an allied tower within range, it returns to its state from 1.5s ago.

skillsZh.name: 命運洞察
skillsZh.description: 遠程和近戰狀態下擁有不同的普攻傷害，技能和近戰普攻命中敵人會對其疊加印記。

skillsZh.name: 命刃・追芒
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向進行攻擊，目標身上有印記時可減少技能冷卻。
遠程：造成傷害，並對前方有印記的目標進行額外攻擊。
近戰：造成傷害和減速，命中有印記的目標可回復自身生命值。

skillsZh.name: 命途行遊
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向突進，且可切換攻擊狀態。
若附近有敵方英雄，則進入近戰狀態，提升物理防禦和法術防禦，並回復生命值；否則進入遠程狀態，留下紀錄點，增加移速。

skillsZh.name: 命運回溯
skillsZh.description:
展開領域，期間處於霸體且不可移動，獲得減傷並回復生命值，血量越低，回復越高。隨後造成法術傷害，自身回溯至紀錄點。
若領域內有己方防禦塔，則將其回溯至1.5秒前狀態。

tips: Build: Boots of Deftness, Holy Grail, Insatiable Tome.
tipsZh: 海諾（中路）：梯度 A，勝率 47.92%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：疾步之靴、聖杯、噬神之書.

patchHistory.change: Reduced the continuous poke of Skill 1 and reduced the damage reduction when Ultimate is used.
patchHistory.detail: "Currently, Heino offers a poor counterplay experience for opponents. His Ultimate's high damage reduction and restoration allow him to continuously poke enemies while being difficult to counter. We've reduced his damage output and the room for error in his Ultimate, giving opponents more opportunities to counter him."

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低1技能持續消耗能力，降低大招施放期間的免傷效果
patchHistoryZh.detail: 目前海諾給對手的對抗體驗較差，大招高額的免傷和回復能力使其可以在敵方面前持續消耗且不容易受到反制，我們降低了他的輸出能力和大招容錯率，給對手更多的反制空間

faqs.question: Is Heino good in current season?
faqs.answer: Heino is Tier A Mage with 47.92% win rate, 1.02% pick rate, and 0.24% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Heino build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of Deftness, Holy Grail, Insatiable Tome, Blazing Cape, Breakthrough Robe, Augur's Word.

faqs.question: How to counter Heino?
faqs.answer: Pick Butterfly, Dharma, Lu Bu. Strong into Diaochan, Mulan, Wukong.

faqsZh.question: 海諾 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 海諾 為 A 梯度，勝率 47.92%、選取 1.02%、禁用 0.24%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 海諾 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：疾步之靴、聖杯、噬神之書、紅蓮斗篷、破繭之衣、時之預言.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 海諾？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Butterfly、Dharma、Lu Bu。海諾 克制 Diaochan、Mulan、Wukong。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Diaochan, Mulan, Wukong. Weak into: Butterfly, Dharma, Lu Bu.

guide.overview: Heino is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 48.0% win rate and 1.2% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Heino: Heino's Basic Attacks differ depending on whether he's in melee or ranged mode.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Tranquility, Holy Grail, Succubus Cloak, then complete Savant's Wrath, Blazing Cape, Eye of the Phoenix. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Heino's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Scepter of Fate → Leap of Fate → Fate Rewind → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Fate Rewind (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Scepter of Fate, and Fate Rewind on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Scepter of Fate → Leap of Fate → Fate Rewind → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Heino is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.2% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Heino. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
comparisons: Heino vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Daji wins 3.0% more often globally. Choose Heino when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Heino vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 3.8% more often globally. Choose Heino when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Heino excels into Diaochan, Mulan, Wukong. Avoid blind picking into Butterfly, Dharma, Lu Bu without team peel.
